name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: World-leading personality questionnaire measuring 32 workplace behaviour dimensions including strategic thinking, influencing style, leadership, teamwork, and interpersonal approach. The most widely used instrument in SHL's portfolio. Appropriate for all levels from graduate to executive. Single administration supports multiple report outputs.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general cognitive ability test combining numerical, inductive, and deductive reasoning in a single 36-minute assessment. The go-to cognitive test for all professional, graduate, managerial, and senior roles. Measures overall problem-solving, critical thinking, and learning potential. Highly multilingual. Appropriate for all job levels.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Interactive adaptive numerical reasoning test. Assesses ability to comprehend and work with numerical information in various formats including tables, graphs, and charts. Suitable for finance, data, analyst, and business roles requiring quantitative thinking. 20 minutes.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgement test designed specifically for graduate-level candidates. Presents realistic workplace scenarios to assess professional judgment, decision-making, teamwork, and work-context behaviour. Untimed. Ideal as a screening tool for graduate programmes and early careers hiring.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering concurrency, JVM internals, performance tuning, design patterns, and production-grade Java development. Calibrated for senior Java engineers owning and extending production microservices. 13 minutes.

name: Spring (New)
description: Knowledge test for Spring Framework covering Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, REST APIs, and enterprise application development with Spring. 9 minutes.

name: SQL (New)
description: SQL knowledge test covering queries, joins, subqueries, stored procedures, indexing, and relational database concepts. Suitable for developers, data analysts, and DBAs. 9 minutes.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Tests AWS cloud development knowledge including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, IAM, and cloud architecture patterns. Suitable for cloud engineers and backend developers. 6 minutes.

name: Docker (New)
description: Tests Docker containerisation knowledge including images, containers, Dockerfile, Docker Compose, and container orchestration basics. 10 minutes.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Tests knowledge of RESTful API design and implementation including HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, versioning, and best practices. 12 minutes.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Tests Linux systems programming knowledge including shell scripting, system calls, process management, file systems, and Linux development tools. 25 minutes.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Tests networking knowledge including TCP/IP, protocols, network architecture, security, and implementation concepts. 7 minutes.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Adaptive live coding interview platform where the interviewer panel can frame real coding tasks in any language directly. Variable duration. Best used when no specific knowledge test exists for the language (e.g., Rust, Go), or for senior engineers where practical problem-solving is more relevant than a knowledge quiz.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Tests financial accounting knowledge including bookkeeping principles, income statements, balance sheets, reconciliation, and GAAP fundamentals. 9 minutes.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Tests foundational statistics knowledge including mean, median, variance, probability, distributions, and data interpretation. 10 minutes. Suitable for analyst and quantitative roles.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Quick knowledge-only Excel test covering formulas, functions, charts, and basic spreadsheet operations. 6 minutes. Multilingual. Suitable for admin, clerical, and business roles where speed of screening matters.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Quick knowledge-only Word test covering document formatting, styles, and core Word features. 4 minutes. Multilingual. Suitable for admin and clerical roles.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation test for Excel 365. Candidates perform real tasks in a live Excel-like environment. 35 minutes. English only. Use when capturing actual capability (not just knowledge) matters — e.g. admin assistants, analysts who use Excel daily.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation test for Word 365. Candidates perform real tasks in a live Word-like environment. 35 minutes. English only.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation test for Word 365 essentials — core features needed for daily document work. 25 minutes. English only.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Tests knowledge of HIPAA security provisions, patient data protection requirements, and healthcare information security best practices. 15 minutes. Relevant for all staff who handle patient records or protected health information.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Tests knowledge of medical terminology used in healthcare settings. Covers anatomical terms, medical abbreviations, and clinical vocabulary. 3 minutes.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Standalone personality instrument measuring integrity, reliability, dependability, and safety-relevant attitudes. Predicts whether someone will actually follow safety procedures — not just what they know about safety. Cross-sector applicability. 10 minutes. Highly multilingual.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Sector-specific bundled personality solution measuring safety-relevant behaviour calibrated with manufacturing and industrial workforce norms. Covers safety attitudes, dependability, and procedure compliance. 16 minutes. Best for plant operators, chemical facilities, heavy manufacturing, industrial settings.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Tests knowledge of workplace health and safety regulations, hazard identification, risk assessment, and safety procedures. 9 minutes. Suitable for manufacturing, industrial, and safety-critical environments.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Automated spoken language screen calibrated for US English accent. Assesses spoken English proficiency for contact centre and customer-facing roles. Use as first-stage screen for high-volume hiring.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Standalone simulation of a live customer call centre interaction. Assesses how a candidate handles real-time customer conversations, multitasking, and problem resolution. 15 minutes. Best for volume screening of entry-level agents.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Bundled solution combining contact centre simulation, personality, and behavioural tests. Measures customer handling, listening, issue resolution, and computer navigation in a simulated call centre environment. 20 minutes. Older but comprehensive solution — better for finalist-stage depth assessment.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
description: Personality and competency measure for entry-level customer service roles in retail and contact centre environments. Assesses service orientation, communication style, and behavioural fit. 19 minutes.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: OPQ report output mapping personality results to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Used alongside OPQ32r administration for structured competency-based selection. Useful for comparing candidates against leadership or role benchmarks.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: OPQ report output specifically for leadership selection and development. Summarises personality results in a leadership context — strategic thinking, people management, drive. Run from a single OPQ32r administration. Multilingual.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Competency and skills assessment measuring current capability levels across a defined skills framework. 16 minutes. Highly multilingual. Used for talent audits, reskilling initiatives, and succession planning.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Development report output from the Global Skills Assessment. Provides personalised development recommendations and learning pathways based on assessed skill gaps. Used alongside GSA for reskilling and talent development programmes.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: Sales-specific OPQ report output that presents personality results through a sales lens — highlighting behaviours tied to sales performance. Can optionally incorporate MQ (Motivational Questionnaire) data to also reflect sales motivators. Run from a single OPQ32r administration; MQ is optional add-on.
duration: Report only (no extra candidate time, or +MQ)

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Report showing how a sales individual contributor shows up in modern, digital-first selling contexts. Assesses adaptability to digital channels, virtual selling, and sales transformation requirements.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to draw logical conclusions from given information, evaluate arguments, and complete scenarios with incomplete information. 18 minutes, 20 items. Suitable for roles requiring structured analytical thinking.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Next-generation numerical ability test measuring ability to derive and calculate numerical problems and work with data in workplace contexts. 20 minutes, 16 items.
